r-(sh-Oligopeptide-75 sh-Oligopeptide-1) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Oligopeptide-75 and sh-Oligopeptide-1. The fusion peptide contains 68 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

s-Rattlesnake Decapeptide-1 Amide is a single chain protein synthetically produced based on a sequence from Acidic Phospholipase A2 Beta which is found in the Eastern diamondback rattlesnake, Crotalus adamanteus. Dickkopf-Related Protein 1 contains a maximum of 266 amino acids consisting of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Acryloyloxypropyl Polysilsesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the acryloxypropyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Acryloxypropyl Polysilsesquioxane is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of Acryloyloxy Propyltrimethoxysilane

Distearoyl Glyceryl Ascorbate is the diester produced by the reaction of stearic acid with Glyceryl Ascorbate
Polyglyceryl-3 Cetearyl Ether Olivate is the reaction product of Olive Acid with the ether formed between Polyglycerin-3 and Cetearyl Alcohol

Lonicera Japonica (Honeysuckle) Flower/(Angelica Gigas/Astragalus Membranaceus) Root/Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice) Extract is the extract of the flowers of Lonicera japonica ; the roots of Angelica gigas and Astragalus membranaceus ; and the whole plant, Glycyrrhiza glabra.
Deutzia Gracilis Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of Deutzia gracilis.
Ribes Nigrum (Black Currant) Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Ribes nigrum grown in culture, Grossulariaceae.

Ribes Nigrum (Black Currant) Callus Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground callus of Ribes nigrum , grown in culture, 
Grossulariaceae
Rubus Ellipticus Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Rubus ellipticus, Rosaceae.
Bornyl Acetate is the organic compound.
Siparuna Guianensis Leaf Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the leaves of  Siparuna guianensis, Siparunaceae.
Quercus Mongolica Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Quercus mongolica, Fagaceae.
Citrus Hystrix Peel Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the peel of Citrus hystrix, Rutaceae.
Galdieria Sulphuraria Extract is the extract of the alga,  Galdieria sulphuraria, Galdieriaceae.
Melia Azedarach Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruits of  Melia azedarach, Meliaceae.

Bacillus/Dimocarpus Longan Fruit/Soybean Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of  Glycine max  (soybean) and the fruit of  Dimocarpus Longan  by the microorganism,  Bacillus.
Rubus Coreanus Seed Extract is the extract of the seeds of  Rubus coreanus, Rosaceae.

Silicone Quaternium-27 is a complex silicone polymer that is made in several steps. First, Glycidoxy Dimethicone is reacted with dimethylamine. The resulting siloxane polymer is then quaternized by reacting the tertiary amine groups created in the previous step with a glycidoxy-terminated polypropylene glycol that contains an average of seven mols of polypropylene oxide. Finally, additional quaternary ammonium groups are created on the silicone polymer by reacting epoxy groups left over from the previous step with dodecyldimethyl amine. The last two reactions are done in the presence of acetic acid so that the positive charges on the finished polymer are balanced by acetate ions.

chemicalName: Silane, hexadecyltrimethoxy-, hydrolysis products with silica
chemicalDescription: Silica Cetyl Silylate is a hydrophobic derivative of fumed silica where the surface of the silica particles has been reacted with Cetyl Trimethoxysilane to form a coating of cetyl polysilsesquioxane.
Pulsatilla Tongkangensis Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Pulsatilla tongkangensis, Ranunculaceae.
Diethylaminoethyl Cellulose is the product obtained by the reaction of 2-(diethylamino)ethanol with Cellulose.
Polyglyceryl-20 Pentacaprylate/Caprate is the pentaester of a mixture of Caprylic Acid and Capric Acid with Polyglycerin-20.
sh-Decapeptide-1 sh-Oligopeptide-4 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide produced by fermentation in  E.coli.
Cobetia Marina Ferment Filtrate Extract is the extract of a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of  Cobetia marina.
Potassium Ethylhexyl/Isotrideceth-8 Phosphate is the potassium salt of a complex mixture of esters formed by the reaction of 2-ethylhexyl alcohol and isotrideceth-8 with phosphoric acid.

rh-Polypeptide-83 is a single chain recombinant human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is directly isolated from a human cell which codes for Proepiregulin used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 169 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Methyl Xanthine is the heterocyclic compound

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: R-THERMOTOGA MARITIMA POLYPEPTIDE-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-105 OLIGOPEPTIDE-106 HEXAPEPTIDE-40
chemicalDescription: r-Thermotoga Maritima Polypeptide-1 Oligopeptide-105 Oligopeptide-106 Hexapeptide-40 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli or Bacillus. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from r-Thermotoga Maritima Polypeptide-1, Oligopeptide-105, Oligopeptide-106 and {25967; Hexapeptide-40}. The fused peptide contains 431amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: R-THERMOTOGA MARITIMA POLYPEPTIDE-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-105 OLIGOPEPTIDE-106 HEXAPEPTIDE-40

chemicalDescription: Ravenala Madagascariensis Aril Extract is the extract of the aril of Ravenala madagascariensis, Strelitzizceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ACETOBACTER/BACILLUS/LACTOBACILLUS/SACCHAROMYCES/RICE/BARLEY/SOYBEAN/CABBAGE/LETTUCE/SPINACH/GRAPE/APPLE/BLUEBERRY/STRAWBERRY/RASPBERRY/CRANBERRY/THYME/ROSEMARY/ALLIUM TUBEROSUM/CITRUS UNSHIU/VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS/ROSA CANINA/CYMBOPOGON SCHOENANTHUS/ERIOCEPHALUS PUNCTULATUS/SEED/FRUIT FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: This is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the whole plants: Oryza sativa (rice), Hordeum distichon (barley), Glycine max (soybean), Brassica oleracea capitata (cabbage), Lactuca scariola sativa (lettuce), Spinacia oleracea (spinach), Vitis vinifera (grape), Pyrus malus (apple), Vaccinium angustifolium (blueberry), Fragaria ananassa (strawberry), Rubus idaeus (raspberry), Vaccinium macrocarpon (cranberry), Thymus vulgaris (thyme), Rosmarinus officinalis (rosemary), Allium tuberosum, Rosa canina, Cymbopogon schoenanthus, Eriocephalus punctulatus ; the fruit of Prunus salicina, Prunus mume, Euterpe oleracea ; and the seeds of Phaseolus radiatus and Phaseolus angularis by the microorganisms, Acetobacter, Bacillus, Lactobacillus and Saccharomyces.
inciName: ACETOBACTER/BACILLUS/LACTOBACILLUS/SACCHAROMYCES/RICE/BARLEY/SOYBEAN/CABBAGE/LETTUCE/SPINACH/GRAPE/APPLE/BLUEBERRY/STRAWBERRY/RASPBERRY/CRANBERRY/THYME/ROSEMARY/ALLIUM TUBEROSUM/CITRUS UNSHIU/VACCINIUM MYRTILLUS/ROSA CANINA/CYMBOPOGON SCHOENANTHUS/ERIOCEPHALUS PUNCTULATUS/SEED/FRUIT FERMENT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Citrus Glauca Fruit is the fruit of Citrus glauca, Rutaceae.
Sodium Cocoyl Hydrolyzed Pea Protein is the sodium salt of the condensation product of coconut acid chloride and Hydrolyzed Pea Protein.
Hydrogenated Panax Ginseng Root Oil is the end product of controlled hydrogenation of the roots of Panax Ginseng Root Oil, Araliaceae.
Saxifraga Oppositifolia Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Saxifraga oppositifolia, Saxifragaceae.
Sea Anemone Extract is the extract of various species of the sea anemone, Cnidaria.
Menthyl Ethylcarbamate is the organic compound.
Oligopeptide-109 is the synthetic peptide containing 12 amino acids consisting of asparagine, cysteine, glutamic acid, hisitidine, isoleucine, methionine, serine and threonine.
Didecyldimonium Nylon-6 Polyphosphate is the product obtained by the reaction of Nylon-6, polyphosphoric acid and Didecyldimonium Chloride.
Pichia/Panax Ginseng Root Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the roots of Panax ginseng by the microorganism, Pichia.
Pinus Pinaster Bark Water is an aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the bark of Pinus Pinaster, Pinaceae.
PEG-15 Butylene Glycol Diisostearate is the polyethylene glycol derivative of the diester of Butylene Glycol and Isostearic Acid containing an average of 15 moles of ethylene oxide.
Methylseleno Carboxyethylglutamine is the organic compound.

sh-Polypeptide-50 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized to be identical to the human gene which codes for Tropoelastin used such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 786 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Sodium Oleoyl Hyaluronate is the product obtained by the reaction of oleic acid with Sodium Hyaluronate
Bis-sh-Pentapeptide-5 Porphyra 334 is the synthetic peptide produced by the reaction of sh-Pentapeptide-5 and Porphyra 334.
Polystichum Retrosopalaceum Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Polystichum retrosopalaceum, Dryoptiridaceae.
Thamnolia Vermicularis Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Thamnolia vermicularis, Icmadophilaceae.
Hydrogenated Camellia Japonica Seed Oil is the end product of controlled hydrogenation of Camellia Japonica Seed Oil.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SACCHAROMYCES/KAEMPFERIA PARVIFLORA RHIZOME FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Saccharomyces/Kaempferia Parviflora Rhizome Ferment Extract Filtrate is the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the rhizomes of  Kaempferia parviflora  by the microorganism,  Saccharomyces.
inciName: SACCHAROMYCES/KAEMPFERIA PARVIFLORA RHIZOME FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Saccharomyces/Linseed Oil Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil by the microorganism,  Saccharomyces
Cleome Gynandra Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Cleome aynandra, Cleomaceae.

Epoxycyclohexylethyl Polysilsesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the epoxycyclohexylethyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group. Epoxycyclohexylethyl Polysilsesquioxane is prepared by the hydrolysis and condensation of 2-(3,4-epoxycyclohexyl)ethyl trimethoxysilane
